hero.description: Building the future of the web with
hero.subtext: Full-stack developer passionate about elegant interfaces and clean code. Turning ideas into digital products that people love to use.

bio.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
bio.paragraph1: Hello! I am a **Full Stack Developer** with a focus on Front-end. Merging my strategic **social media** background with technology, I have built a solid practical foundation: 2 years of freelance experience and 1 year in the e-commerce sector. I am currently completing my degree in **Systems Analysis and Development**.
bio.paragraph2: I have strong proficiency in **React** and **Node.js**, with hands-on experience implementing design-accurate interfaces (**UX/UI**) and **CRO** features to drive conversions. Whether building backend APIs or dynamic front-ends, I focus on delivering clean code, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.
